Class NPCSim

java.lang.Object
simcli.entities.actors.Sim
simcli.entities.actors.NPCSim
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISimBehaviour
public class NPCSim extends Sim
A non-playable character (NPC) Sim that inhabits the park.

NPCs are generated by NPCManager with random names, ages, genders, and jobs. They can be befriended and eventually married into the player's household.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NPCSim(String name, int age)
    Constructs a new NPC with a randomly assigned gender.
    NPCSim(String name, int age, Gender gender, Job job)
    Constructs a new NPC with explicit gender and career.

  • Constructor Details

    • NPCSim

      public NPCSim(String name, int age)
      Constructs a new NPC with a randomly assigned gender.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of this NPC.
      age - the starting age of this NPC.

    • NPCSim

      public NPCSim(String name, int age, Gender gender, Job job)
      Constructs a new NPC with explicit gender and career.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of this NPC.
      age - the starting age of this NPC.
      gender - the gender of this NPC.
      job - the career assigned to this NPC.
